files.mg_00142.v:
module mg_00142(output [15 : 0] data_out,input [4 : 0] ctrl,input [15 : 0] data_in_A,input [15 : 0] data_in_B);
wire [1 : 0] sign_union; 
  assign sign_union = {data_in_A[15], data_in_B[15]}; 
  assign data_out = 
  (ctrl == 0) ? data_in_A : 
  (ctrl == 1) ? data_in_B : 
  (ctrl == 2) ? (data_in_A+data_in_B) : 
  (ctrl == 3) ? (data_in_A-data_in_B) : 
  (ctrl == 4) ? (data_in_A&data_in_B) : 
  (ctrl == 5) ? (data_in_A|data_in_B) : 
  (ctrl == 6) ? (~data_in_A) : 
  (ctrl == 7) ? (data_in_A^data_in_B) : 
  (ctrl == 8) ? (data_in_A != data_in_B) : 
  (ctrl == 9) ? (data_in_B<<data_in_A) : 
  (ctrl == 10) ? (data_in_B>>data_in_A) : 
  (ctrl == 11) ? (data_in_A<<(data_in_B ? data_in_B : 8)) : 
  (ctrl == 12) ? (data_in_A < data_in_B) : 
  (ctrl == 13) ? ($signed(data_in_B)>>>data_in_A) : 
  (ctrl == 14) ? (data_in_A>>(data_in_B ? data_in_B : 8)) : 
  (ctrl == 15) ? ($signed(data_in_A)>>>(data_in_B ? data_in_B : 8)) : 
  (sign_union == 2'b01 ? 0 : (sign_union == 2'b10 ? 1 : ((data_in_A < data_in_B)^sign_union[1]))); 
 endmodule

files.mg_02901.v:
module mg_02901(input in,input reset,input clock,output reg out);
reg [2:0] state; 
 parameter s0 = 3'b000, s1 = 3'b001, s2 = 3'b010, s3 = 3'b011, s4 = 3'b100, s5 = 3'b101; 
 always @(posedge clock) 
 begin 
  if (reset) 
  begin 
  state <= s0; 
  out <= 0 ; 
  end 
  else 
  case(state) 
  s0 : if (in) begin state <= s1; out <= 0 ; end 
  else begin state <= s0; out <= 0 ; end 
  s1 : if (in) begin state <= s1; out <= 0 ; end 
  else begin state <= s2; out <= 0 ; end 
  s2 : if (in) begin state <= s1; out <= 0 ; end 
  else begin state <= s3; out <= 0 ; end 
  s3 : if (in) begin state <= s1; out <= 0 ; end 
  else begin state <= s4; out <= 0 ; end 
  s4 : if (in) begin state <= s5; out <= 1 ; end 
  else begin state <= s0; out <= 0 ; end 
  s5 : if (in) begin state <= s1; out <= 0 ; end 
  else begin state <= s2; out <= 0 ; end 
  default: if (in) begin state <= s0; out <= 0 ; end 
  else begin state <= s0; out <= 0 ; end 
  endcase 
 end 
 endmodule

files.origen_087508.v:
module origen_087508 #(
    parameter data_wl = 16,
    parameter op_wl = 8
)(
    input [data_wl-1:0] a_in,
    input [data_wl-1:0] b_in,
    input [op_wl-1:0] op_in,
    input z_flag_in,
    input s_flag_in,
    input c_flag_in,
    input ovr_flag_in,
    output reg [data_wl-1:0] c_out,
    output reg z_flag_out,
    output reg s_flag_out,
    output reg c_flag_out,
    output reg ovr_flag_out,
    output reg op_active
);

reg [data_wl:0] c_reg;

always @(*) begin
    c_reg = 0;
    op_active = 1'b1;

    case(op_in)
        8'h40: c_reg = a_in & b_in;                    // AND
        8'h41: c_reg = a_in | b_in;                    // OR
        8'h42: c_reg = a_in ^ b_in;                    // XOR
        8'h43: c_reg = ~(a_in | b_in);                 // NOR
        8'h44: c_reg = ~(a_in & b_in);                 // NAND
        8'h45: c_reg = ~(a_in ^ b_in);                 // XNOR
        8'h46: c_reg = a_in;                           // A
        8'h47: c_reg = b_in;                           // B
        8'h48: c_reg = ~a_in;                          // NOT A
        8'h49: c_reg = ~b_in;                          // NOT B
        8'h4A: c_reg = a_in & (~b_in);                 // A AND NOT B
        8'h4B: c_reg = (~a_in) & b_in;                 // NOT A AND B
        8'h4C: c_reg = a_in | (~b_in);                 // A OR NOT B
        8'h4D: c_reg = (~a_in) | b_in;                 // NOT A OR B
        8'h4E: c_reg = (a_in & b_in) | (~a_in & ~b_in); // A EQUALS B
        8'h4F: c_reg = (a_in & ~b_in) | (~a_in & b_in); // A NOT EQUALS B
        default: op_active = 1'b0;
    endcase

    c_out = c_reg[data_wl-1:0];
    z_flag_out = (c_out == 0);
    s_flag_out = c_out[data_wl-1];
    c_flag_out = c_flag_in;
    ovr_flag_out = ovr_flag_in;
end

endmodule

files.autovcoder_023074.v:
module autovcoder_023074 (
    input  [3:0] COUNTER_IN_LOW,   // 
    input  [7:4] COUNTER_IN_HIGH,  // 
    input        MPC_LOAD_BAR,     //
    input        RESET,            //
    input        COUNT,            //
    input        SYSTEM_CLK,       // 
    output [7:0] COUNTER_OUT       // 
);

  // WIRES
  wire CARRY;
  wire NOTHING;

  // ASSIGN VALUES
  assign HIGH = 1'b1;

  // COUNTER1 - 4-bit synchronous counter
  ta161_bar COUNTER1 (
      .CLR_BAR(RESET),
      .LD_BAR(MPC_LOAD_BAR),
      .ENT(HIGH),
      .ENP(COUNT),
      .CLK(SYSTEM_CLK),
      .A(COUNTER_IN_LOW[0]),
      .B(COUNTER_IN_LOW[1]),
      .C(COUNTER_IN_LOW[2]),
      .D(COUNTER_IN_LOW[3]),
      .QA(COUNTER_OUT[0]),
      .QB(COUNTER_OUT[1]),
      .QC(COUNTER_OUT[2]),
      .QD(COUNTER_OUT[3]),
      .RCO(CARRY)
  );

  // COUNTER2 - 4-bit synchronous counter
  ta161_bar COUNTER2 (
      .CLR_BAR(RESET),
      .LD_BAR(MPC_LOAD_BAR),
      .ENT(CARRY),
      .ENP(COUNT),
      .CLK(SYSTEM_CLK),
      .A(COUNTER_IN_HIGH[4]),
      .B(COUNTER_IN_HIGH[5]),
      .C(COUNTER_IN_HIGH[6]),
      .D(COUNTER_IN_HIGH[7]),
      .QA(COUNTER_OUT[4]),
      .QB(COUNTER_OUT[5]),
      .QC(COUNTER_OUT[6]),
      .QD(COUNTER_OUT[7]),
      .RCO(NOTHING)
  );

endmodule

files.origen_118878.v:
module origen_118878(
    input wire alu_op,
    input wire s,
    input wire branch,
    input wire mult,
    input wire [3:0] cmd,
    output reg no_write,
    output reg not_alu,
    output reg not_shift,
    output reg swap,
    output reg inv,
    output reg [2:0] alu_ctl,
    output reg [1:0] flag_w
);

always @(*) begin
    if (alu_op) begin
        case (cmd)
            4'b0000: begin alu_ctl = 3'b000; no_write = 0; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 0; swap = 0; inv = 0; end // AND
            4'b0001: begin alu_ctl = 3'b001; no_write = 0; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 0; swap = 0; inv = 0; end // EOR
            4'b0010: begin alu_ctl = 3'b010; no_write = 0; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 0; swap = 1; inv = 0; end // SUB
            4'b0011: begin alu_ctl = 3'b010; no_write = 0; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 0; swap = 0; inv = 0; end // RSB
            4'b0100: begin alu_ctl = 3'b011; no_write = 0; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 0; swap = 0; inv = 0; end // ADD
            4'b0101: begin alu_ctl = 3'b011; no_write = 0; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 0; swap = 0; inv = 1; end // ADC
            4'b0110: begin alu_ctl = 3'b010; no_write = 0; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 0; swap = 1; inv = 1; end // SBC
            4'b0111: begin alu_ctl = 3'b010; no_write = 0; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 0; swap = 0; inv = 1; end // RSC
            4'b1000: begin alu_ctl = 3'b000; no_write = 1; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 0; swap = 0; inv = 0; end // TST
            4'b1001: begin alu_ctl = 3'b001; no_write = 1; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 0; swap = 0; inv = 0; end // TEQ
            4'b1010: begin alu_ctl = 3'b010; no_write = 1; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 0; swap = 1; inv = 0; end // CMP
            4'b1011: begin alu_ctl = 3'b010; no_write = 1; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 0; swap = 0; inv = 0; end // CMN
            4'b1100: begin alu_ctl = 3'b100; no_write = 0; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 0; swap = 0; inv = 0; end // ORR
            4'b1101: begin alu_ctl = 3'b101; no_write = 0; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 1; swap = 0; inv = 0; end // MOV
            4'b1110: begin alu_ctl = 3'b110; no_write = 0; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 0; swap = 0; inv = 0; end // BIC
            4'b1111: begin alu_ctl = 3'b111; no_write = 0; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 1; swap = 0; inv = 0; end // MVN
        endcase
        flag_w = (alu_ctl[2:1] == 2'b00) ? {s, s} : {s, 1'b0};
    end else begin
        casez ({mult, branch, cmd[3:1], s})
            6'b1?????: begin alu_ctl = 3'b011; flag_w = 2'b00; not_alu = 1; not_shift = 1; end // Multiply
            6'b01????: begin alu_ctl = 3'b010; flag_w = 2'b00; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 1; end // Branch
            6'b001???: begin alu_ctl = 3'b011; flag_w = 2'b00; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 1; end // Load/Store
            6'b000??0: begin alu_ctl = 3'b011; flag_w = 2'b10; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 1; end // DP Imm
            6'b000??1: begin alu_ctl = 3'b011; flag_w = 2'b11; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 0; end // DP Reg
            default:   begin alu_ctl = 3'b011; flag_w = 2'b00; not_alu = 0; not_shift = 1; end
        endcase
        no_write = 0;
        swap = 0;
        inv = 0;
    end
end

endmodule

files.autovcoder_112674.v:
module autovcoder_112674 (
    input MCLK,  // 48.0MHz
    input RESET,

    input [7:0] INP0,
    input [7:0] INP1,
    input [7:0] INP2,

    input [7:0] DSW0,
    input [7:0] DSW1,

    input [8:0] PH,
    input [8:0] PV,

    output PCLK,
    output [11:0] POUT,

    output [15:0] SND,

    input    ROMCL,
    input  [19:0] ROMAD,
    input   [7:0] ROMDT,
    input    ROMEN
);

  // Clock Generator
  wire CLK24M, CLK12M, CLK6M, CLK4M, CLK3M, CLK1M5;
  SOLOMON_CLKGEN cgen (
      MCLK,
      CLK24M,
      CLK12M,
      CLK6M,
      CLK4M,
      CLK3M,
      CLK1M5
  );

  wire VCLKx8  = MCLK;
  wire VCLKx4  = CLK24M;
  wire VCLKx2  = CLK12M;
  wire VCLK    = CLK6M;

  wire CPUCL   = CLK4M;
  wire SCPUCL  = CLK3M;

  // Main CPU
  wire [15:0] CPUAD;
  wire [7:0] CPUWD, VIDDT;
  wire CPUMW, SNDWR, VIDDV, VBLK;
  SOLOMON_MAIN main (
      RESET,
      CPUCL,
      CPUAD,
      CPUWD,
      CPUMW,
      SNDWR,
      VIDDT,
      VIDDV,
      VBLK,
      INP0,
      INP1,
      INP2,
      DSW0,
      DSW1,

      ROMCL,
      ROMAD,
      ROMDT,
      ROMEN
  );

  // Video
  wire SNDT;
  SOLOMON_VIDEO video (
      VCLKx4,
      VCLKx2,
      VCLK,
      PH,
      PV,
      PCLK,
      POUT,
      VBLK,
      SNDT,

      CPUCL,
      CPUAD,
      CPUMW,
      CPUWD,
      VIDDT,
      VIDDV,

      ROMCL,
      ROMAD,
      ROMDT,
      ROMEN
  );

  // Sound
  wire [7:0] SNDNO = CPUWD;
  SOLOMON_SOUND sound (
      RESET,
      SCPUCL,
      CPUCL,
      SNDNO,
      SNDWR,
      SNDT,
      CLK1M5,
      SND,

      ROMCL,
      ROMAD,
      ROMDT,
      ROMEN
  );

endmodule

files.autovcoder_135937.v:
module autovcoder_135937 (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input [3:0] dividend,
    input [3:0] divisor,
    output reg [3:0] quotient,
    output reg [3:0] remainder,
    output reg done
);
    reg [3:0] A; // Accumulator
    reg [3:0] Q; // Quotient
    reg [3:0] M; // Divisor
    reg [3:0] count; // Count for iterations
    reg state; // State to indicate processing

    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            A <= 4'b0000;
            Q <= 4'b0000;
            M <= divisor;
            quotient <= 4'b0000;
            remainder <= 4'b0000;
            done <= 0;
            count <= 4; // Number of bits for division
            state <= 1; // Start state
        end else if (state) begin
            if (count > 0) begin
                A <= {A[2:0], Q[3]}; // Shift left
                Q <= {Q[2:0], 1'b0}; // Shift left in Q
                A <= A - M; // Subtract divisor from A

                if (A[3] == 1) begin // A < 0
                    A <= A + M; // Restore A
                    Q[0] <= 0; // No change in Q
                end else begin
                    Q[0] <= 1; // Set Q bit
                end
                count <= count - 1; // Decrement count
            end else begin
                quotient <= Q;
                remainder <= A;
                done <= 1; // Indicate division is done
                state <= 0; // End state
            end
        end
    end
endmodule

files.origen_149965.v:
`define ST_STOPPED   2'b00
`define ST_STARTING  2'b01
`define ST_STOPPING  2'b10
`define ST_STARTED   2'b11

module origen_149965(
    input clk,
    input hps_cmd,
    input cpu_halt,
    output reg[1:0] state,
    output reg alive
);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        case (state)
            `ST_STOPPED: begin
                if (hps_cmd) begin
                    state <= `ST_STARTING;
                end
                alive <= 1'b0;
            end
            `ST_STARTING: begin
                if (!hps_cmd) begin
                    state <= `ST_STARTED;
                    alive <= 1'b1;
                end
            end
            `ST_STOPPING: begin
                if (!hps_cmd) begin
                    state <= `ST_STOPPED;
                    alive <= 1'b0;
                end
            end
            `ST_STARTED: begin
                if (hps_cmd) begin
                    state <= `ST_STOPPING;
                    alive <= 1'b0;
                end
                if (cpu_halt) begin
                    state <= `ST_STOPPED;
                    alive <= 1'b0;
                end
            end
            default: begin
                state <= `ST_STOPPED;
                alive <= 1'b0;
            end
        endcase
    end

endmodule

files.origen_084457.v:
module origen_084457 #(
    parameter DW = 8,
    parameter OUT_DW = DW,
    parameter MEM_SIZE = 14,
    parameter MEM_ADDR = 4
)(
    input signed [DW:0] data_in,
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input write_en,
    input read_en,
    input chiprd_en,
    input [MEM_ADDR-1:0] in_address,
    input [MEM_ADDR-1:0] out_address,
    output reg signed [OUT_DW:0] data_out,
    output reg signed [(OUT_DW+1)*MEM_SIZE-1:0] result_out
);

    reg signed [DW:0] mem [0:MEM_SIZE-1];
    integer i;

    always @(negedge reset or posedge clk) begin
        if (!reset) begin
            for (i = 0; i < MEM_SIZE; i = i + 1) begin
                mem[i] <= 0;
            end
        end else if (write_en) begin
            mem[in_address] <= data_in;
        end
    end

    always @(*) begin
        if (read_en) begin
            if (out_address < MEM_SIZE) begin
                data_out = mem[out_address];
            end else begin
                data_out = 0;
            end
        end else begin
            data_out = 0;
        end
    end

    always @(*) begin
        if (chiprd_en) begin
            for (i = 0; i < MEM_SIZE; i = i + 1) begin
                result_out[(i+1)*(OUT_DW+1)-1 -: OUT_DW+1] = mem[i];
            end
        end else begin
            result_out = 0;
        end
    end

endmodule

files.origen_053067.v:
module origen_053067 #(
    parameter CORE = 0,
    parameter DATA_WIDTH = 32,
    parameter ADDR_WIDTH = 8,
    parameter SCAN_CYCLES_MIN = 0,
    parameter SCAN_CYCLES_MAX = 1000
) (
    input wire clock,
    input wire reset,
    input wire readEnable,
    input wire [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] readAddress,
    input wire writeEnable,
    input wire [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] writeAddress,
    input wire [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] writeData,
    input wire scan,
    output reg [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] readData
);

    localparam MEMORY_DEPTH = 2**ADDR_WIDTH;

    reg [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] memory [0:MEMORY_DEPTH-1];
    reg [31:0] cycle_counter;

    always @(posedge clock or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            cycle_counter <= 0;
        end else begin
            cycle_counter <= cycle_counter + 1;
        end
    end

    always @(posedge clock) begin
        if (writeEnable) begin
            memory[writeAddress] <= writeData;
        end
    end

    always @(*) begin
        if (readEnable) begin
            if (writeEnable && (readAddress == writeAddress)) begin
                readData = writeData;
            end else begin
                readData = memory[readAddress];
            end
        end else begin
            readData = {DATA_WIDTH{1'b0}};
        end
    end

    always @(posedge clock) begin
        if (scan && (cycle_counter >= SCAN_CYCLES_MIN) && (cycle_counter <= SCAN_CYCLES_MAX)) begin
            $display("BSRAM Core: %0d, Cycle: %0d, ReadEn: %b, ReadAddr: %h, ReadData: %h, WriteEn: %b, WriteAddr: %h, WriteData: %h",
                     CORE, cycle_counter, readEnable, readAddress, readData, writeEnable, writeAddress, writeData);
        end
    end

endmodule

files.origen_210953.v:
module origen_210953(
    input clock,
    input reset,
    output reg a, b, c, d, e, f, g,
    output reg dp,
    output reg [3:0] an
);

reg [28:0] ticker;
reg [2:0] clickcount;
reg [6:0] first, second, third, fourth;

wire click;
assign click = (ticker == 29'd50000000);

always @(posedge clock or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
        ticker <= 29'd0;
        clickcount <= 3'd0;
    end
    else begin
        ticker <= ticker + 29'd1;
        if (click) begin
            ticker <= 29'd0;
            clickcount <= clickcount + 3'd1;
        end
    end
end

always @(clickcount) begin
    case (clickcount)
        3'd0: begin
            first <= 7'b1000000; // 'S'
            second <= 7'b0100001; // 'c'
            third <= 7'b1000000; // 'S'
            fourth <= 7'b0100011; // 'r'
        end
        3'd1: begin
            first <= 7'b0100011; // 'r'
            second <= 7'b0001000; // 'o'
            third <= 7'b1000000; // 'S'
            fourth <= 7'b0100011; // 'r'
        end
        3'd2: begin
            first <= 7'b0100011; // 'r'
            second <= 7'b0100001; // 'c'
            third <= 7'b0100011; // 'r'
            fourth <= 7'b0100001; // 'c'
        end
        3'd3: begin
            first <= 7'b0100001; // 'c'
            second <= 7'b0100001; // 'c'
            third <= 7'b0100001; // 'c'
            fourth <= 7'b0100001; // 'c'
        end
        3'd4: begin
            first <= 7'b1000000; // 'S'
            second <= 7'b1000000; // 'S'
            third <= 7'b1000000; // 'S'
            fourth <= 7'b1000000; // 'S'
        end
        3'd5: begin
            first <= 7'b0100011; // 'r'
            second <= 7'b0100011; // 'r'
            third <= 7'b0100011; // 'r'
            fourth <= 7'b0100011; // 'r'
        end
        3'd6: begin
            first <= 7'b0100001; // 'c'
            second <= 7'b0100001; // 'c'
            third <= 7'b0100001; // 'c'
            fourth <= 7'b0100001; // 'c'
        end
        3'd7: begin
            first <= 7'b1000000; // 'S'
            second <= 7'b1000000; // 'S'
            third <= 7'b1000000; // 'S'
            fourth <= 7'b1000000; // 'S'
        end
        default: begin
            first <= 7'b1000000; // 'S'
            second <= 7'b0100001; // 'c'
            third <= 7'b1000000; // 'S'
            fourth <= 7'b0100011; // 'r'
        end
    endcase
end

reg [1:0] count;
always @(posedge clock) begin
    if (click) begin
        count <= count + 2'd1;
    end
end

always @(count, first, second, third, fourth) begin
    case (count)
        2'd0: begin
            a <= ~first[6]; b <= ~first[5]; c <= ~first[4];
            d <= ~first[3]; e <= ~first[2]; f <= ~first[1];
            g <= ~first[0]; dp <= 1'b1;
            an <= 4'b1110;
        end
        2'd1: begin
            a <= ~second[6]; b <= ~second[5]; c <= ~second[4];
            d <= ~second[3]; e <= ~second[2]; f <= ~second[1];
            g <= ~second[0]; dp <= 1'b1;
            an <= 4'b1101;
        end
        2'd2: begin
            a <= ~third[6]; b <= ~third[5]; c <= ~third[4];
            d <= ~third[3]; e <= ~third[2]; f <= ~third[1];
            g <= ~third[0]; dp <= 1'b1;
            an <= 4'b1011;
        end
        2'd3: begin
            a <= ~fourth[6]; b <= ~fourth[5]; c <= ~fourth[4];
            d <= ~fourth[3]; e <= ~fourth[2]; f <= ~fourth[1];
            g <= ~fourth[0]; dp <= 1'b1;
            an <= 4'b0111;
        end
    endcase
end

endmodule
